metadata.description: Palate: the taste layer for AI website builders. Install the Palate website-builder plugin (skill + MCP-depth hooks; connect the Palate MCP with one claude mcp add --scope user command after install) for Claude Code.

plugins.name: palate-website-builder
plugins.description: Builds production-grade Astro websites grounded by the Palate MCP (real design taste from deeply-analysed reference sites), plus brand packages. It runs a divergent-to-convergent concept spine, a self-issued build commission held to an awards-grade bar, a screenshot-grounded visual self-review loop, and novelty + buildability gates that block on real evidence rather than a claim. The 1.4.x line adds anti-slop guards that catch generic AI-tell layouts and copy before they ship. After install, connect the Palate MCP with one claude mcp add --scope user command (free token at app.palatemcp.com).
